final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: high-end jewelry brand campaign, luxury advertising still
Primary request: editorial jewelry portrait of a sapphire and diamond set inspired by deep ocean, featuring necklace, earrings and bracelet on an elegant East Asian model
Scene/backdrop: luxury yacht deck at night, gentle sea breeze, deep dark ocean and starry sky in background
Subject: sophisticated East Asian female model with fair porcelain skin, wearing deep blue strapless evening gown; jewelry set includes necklace with 15-carat Sri Lankan royal blue sapphire center stone surrounded by 8 carats of pear and round brilliant diamonds, platinum setting with intricate wave and coral engravings, plus matching earrings and bracelet, gems sparkling brilliantly at neck and ears
Style/medium: high-end jewelry advertising photography, Cartier and Tiffany top-tier campaign aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium close-up, three-quarter portrait, jewelry as focal point, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: professional multi-angle jewelry lighting system, precise accent lighting to maximize gem fire and brilliance, soft fill light on model, luxurious and mysterious atmosphere
Color palette: deep royal blue sapphire + brilliant white diamonds + platinum silver + midnight navy gown + dark ocean blues + starlight whites
Materials/textures: faceted sapphire with velvety depth, scintillating diamond facets, polished platinum with fine engraving detail, silk gown fabric, polished yacht deck
Constraints: keep the 15-carat Sri Lankan royal blue sapphire as hero stone, preserve the wave and coral engraving details on platinum setting, maintain jewelry as primary focal point
Avoid: cheap costume jewelry look, plastic gems, overexposed highlights losing gem detail, cluttered background, watermark
